findings.summary: Public Phase 1 endpoints are deployed and verified against the live cranfield-v0 OpenSearch index.
Full Cranfield export is implemented, cranfield-v0 is loaded with 1,400 live documents, and live evaluation metrics were recorded.
Cloudflare Workers write scope was proven by secret upload and Worker deployment.

residual_risks: Public endpoint p95 latency needs a broader sampled run beyond point checks.
Provider cost depends on the selected managed OpenSearch service plan and usage.
